sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38354" key="e)paskhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπασκ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n38354.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must practise,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg005:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
